summary: Iteration 154 - FLORIDA OFFSHORE COORDINATES VERIFIED. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All Florida surf spots are correctly positioned EAST of the shoreline (in the ocean). Key spots verified: Daytona Beach (29.2118, -80.98), Cocoa Beach Pier (28.3678, -80.58), Sebastian Inlet (27.8562, -80.42), Jacksonville Beach Pier (30.2858, -81.36), and more.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Florida Atlantic coast surf spots verified as offshore. Key insight: Florida's Atlantic coast faces EAST, so to be in the water, longitude must be LESS negative (more positive). Shoreline references: Jacksonville -81.40, Daytona -81.02, Space Coast -80.61, Sebastian -80.45, Miami -80.12. All pins are 0.02-0.04 degrees EAST of these values.

verified_features.coordinate_validation_rule: Florida Atlantic coast: All spots have longitude LESS negative than shoreline (EAST = in water)
